Car_NO2.description: NO2 concentrations (ppb) in exhaust fumes of cars; its variance (12.982) is identified in the answer as the lowest variance used to compute F_max.

Minibus_NO2.description: NO2 concentrations (ppb) in exhaust fumes of minibuses; its variance (30.786) is identified in the answer as the highest variance used to compute F_max.

Bus_NO2.description: NO2 concentrations (ppb) in exhaust fumes of buses; its variance is implicitly computed as part of the F_max test (k=3 confirms all three groups are included).
